portal.visual_thesis: Luminous sacred geometry with executive clarity and an operational core.
interaction_thesis: Poster-style first viewport with one dominant visual anchor.
Calm motion that reinforces trust and orientation.
Strong offer hierarchy with clear upgrade paths.

tracks.title: Revenue Rollout
tracks.summary: Monetize the portal, funnel, and product ladder with live checkout links and campaign assets.

tracks.title: Design-System Expansion
tracks.summary: Use one sacred-geometry design core with company accent layers across web, app, and campaigns.

tracks.title: Customer Mobile App
tracks.summary: Ship a customer-facing iPhone experience for offers, intake, and library access.

tracks.title: Back-Office Automation
tracks.summary: Route leads, content, campaigns, hours, payroll readiness, and deploy checks through one assistant layer.

stripe.summary: Stripe payment links are live on the public site.

square.summary: Square can be added with Payment Links or Buy Buttons once live URLs are available.

workflow_stages.label: Intake
workflow_stages.description: Normalize the request, company context, constraints, and urgency.

workflow_stages.label: Context Load
workflow_stages.description: Pull prior prompts, docs, and campaign or delivery references.

workflow_stages.label: Pattern Recognition
workflow_stages.description: Identify repeatable needs, blockers, and leverage points.

workflow_stages.label: Architecture Framing
workflow_stages.description: Choose the right system shape across revenue, design, mobile, and ops.

workflow_stages.label: Prompt Assembly
workflow_stages.description: Compile reusable prompt packs and task-ready instructions.

workflow_stages.label: Execution Planning
workflow_stages.description: Select workflows, risk tier, operators, and automation boundaries.

workflow_stages.label: Build / Integrate
workflow_stages.description: Produce content, code, configs, assets, and integration payloads.

workflow_stages.label: Verification
workflow_stages.description: Run QA, smoke tests, link checks, and content review.

workflow_stages.label: Refinement
workflow_stages.description: Tighten conversion flow, clarity, and operating quality.

workflow_stages.label: Deployment
workflow_stages.description: Prepare public assets, deploy safely, and verify live surfaces.

workflow_stages.label: Daily Command Mode
workflow_stages.description: Summarize status, route the next actions, and preserve memory.

prompt_packs.title: Source Analyst
prompt_packs.goal: Convert notes and prompts into goals, constraints, deliverables, and contradictions.

prompt_packs.title: Voice Architect
prompt_packs.goal: Blend executive clarity with spiritually resonant language in calibrated tone modes.

prompt_packs.title: Offer Strategist
prompt_packs.goal: Build a practical entry/core/premium ladder with objections and proof types.

prompt_packs.title: Sacred Visual Director
prompt_packs.goal: Turn sacred geometry into reusable color, type, motion, and layout rules.

prompt_packs.title: Release Manager
prompt_packs.goal: Sequence preflight, deployment, verification, and rollback steps.

workflow_catalog.title: Portal Refresh
workflow_catalog.description: Rebuild the public portal, funnel pages, and shared business data bundle.

workflow_catalog.title: Campaign Refresh
workflow_catalog.description: Prepare new organic campaign copy, KPI tracking, and outbound content drafts.

workflow_catalog.title: Lead Follow-Up
workflow_catalog.description: Queue outreach summaries, next-step prompts, and follow-up content for captured leads.

workflow_catalog.title: Design System Sync
workflow_catalog.description: Refresh design tokens, component guidance, and shared creative references.

workflow_catalog.title: Payroll Readiness
workflow_catalog.description: Prepare hours, pay period inputs, approvals, and exception tracking without executing payroll.

workflow_catalog.title: Legal Readiness
workflow_catalog.description: Prepare entity, trust, compliance, and filing checklists without executing legal steps.

workflow_catalog.title: Banking Readiness
workflow_catalog.description: Prepare banking package inputs, account documentation, and review questions without moving funds.

automation_categories.title: Daily Revenue Summary
automation_categories.summary: Summarize live offers, site status, and the current pipeline of monetization tasks.

automation_categories.title: Campaign Content Queue
automation_categories.summary: Generate reusable short-form posts, CTA variants, and scheduled follow-up drafts.

automation_categories.title: Lead Follow-Up Queue
automation_categories.summary: Route new leads into content, offer, and contact follow-up tracks.

automation_categories.title: Deploy Health Check
automation_categories.summary: Verify the live portal, product surface, and library endpoints after every publish.

automation_categories.title: Product Refresh Queue
automation_categories.summary: Refresh offer copy, product bundles, and conversion assets using the same catalog.

automation_categories.title: Payroll Readiness Pack
automation_categories.summary: Assemble hours, approvals, and exception notes without submitting payroll.
